name: Welcome
description: Warm, brief welcome for new users with a single primary call to action.
subject: Welcome to {{company_name}}

variables.name: company_name
variables.description: Sender company or product name; rendered as the header wordmark and in the footer.

variables.name: support_email
variables.description: Support contact email address shown in the footer.

variables.name: company_address
variables.description: Physical mailing address for the footer (CAN-SPAM).

variables.name: preheader
variables.description: Hidden inbox preview text shown next to the subject line.
variables.example: Your account is ready. One step to get started.

variables.name: recipient_name
variables.description: Recipient's first name or display name.

variables.name: cta_url
variables.description: Destination URL of the primary call-to-action button.

variables.name: cta_label
variables.description: Label text on the primary call-to-action button.
